case_title: LEXINGTON LAW GROUP VS. S & D SYSTEMS et al

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-31-2013 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEXINGTON LAW GROUP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT S & D  SYSTEMS PEREIRA, DON $3,764.75 PRINCIPAL, $169.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,933.75 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-31-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-31-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY DON PEREIRA--OWNER. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY JOHN BANISTER--LITIGATION ADMINISTRATOR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR LEXINGTON LAW GROUP ASSIGNED TO QUAN, HENDSON
